creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: wen
Date: Tue Sep 18 07:18:15 2012
New Revision: 304430
URL: http://svn.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/304430

Log:
  This port adds the Sale Opportunity Module to the Tryton Application Platform.
  
  WWW: http://www.tryton.org/
  
  PR:		171465
  Submitted by:	Matthias Petermann <matthias@d2ux.net>

Added:
  head/finance/trytond_sale_opportunity/
  head/finance/trytond_sale_opportunity/Makefile   (contents, props changed)
  head/finance/trytond_sale_opportunity/distinfo   (contents, props changed)
  head/finance/trytond_sale_opportunity/pkg-descr   (contents, props changed)
  head/finance/trytond_sale_opportunity/pkg-plist   (contents, props changed)
Modified:
  head/finance/Makefile

Modified: head/finance/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/finance/Makefile	Tue Sep 18 05:43:23 2012	(r304429)
+++ head/finance/Makefile	Tue Sep 18 07:18:15 2012	(r304430)
@@ -121,6 +121,7 @@
     SUBDIR += trytond_project_revenue
     SUBDIR += trytond_purchase
     SUBDIR += trytond_sale
+    SUBDIR += trytond_sale_opportunity
     SUBDIR += trytond_stock
     SUBDIR += trytond_timesheet
     SUBDIR += venice

Added: head/finance/trytond_sale_opportunity/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/finance/trytond_sale_opportunity/Makefile	Tue Sep 18 07:18:15 2012	(r304430)
@@ -0,0 +1,24 @@
+# New ports collection makefile for:	trytond_sale_opportunity
+# Date created:		08 September, 2012
+# Whom:			Matthias Petermann<matthias@petermann.it>
+#
+# $FreeBSD$
+#
+
+PORTNAME=	trytond_sale_opportunity
+PORTVERSION=	2.4.0
+CATEGORIES=	finance python
+MASTER_SITES=	http://downloads2.tryton.org/${PORTVERSION:R}/
+
+MAINTAINER=	matthias@petermann.it
+COMMENT=	Tryton Application Platform (Sale Opportunity Module)
+
+LICENSE=	GPLv3
+
+RUN_DEPENDS=	trytond>=2.4.0:${PORTSDIR}/finance/trytond \
+		trytond_sale>=2.4.0:${PORTSDIR}/finance/trytond_sale
+
+USE_PYTHON=	yes
+USE_PYDISTUTILS=easy_install
+
+.include <bsd.port.mk>

Added: head/finance/trytond_sale_opportunity/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/finance/trytond_sale_opportunity/distinfo	Tue Sep 18 07:18:15 2012	(r304430)
@@ -0,0 +1,2 @@
+SHA256 (trytond_sale_opportunity-2.4.0.tar.gz) = dbf9a1866bef82c923327e706914886fd60248d9fd5d623c83354a1053340f97
+SIZE (trytond_sale_opportunity-2.4.0.tar.gz) = 38902

Added: head/finance/trytond_sale_opportunity/pkg-descr
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/finance/trytond_sale_opportunity/pkg-descr	Tue Sep 18 07:18:15 2012	(r304430)
@@ -0,0 +1,3 @@
+This port adds the Sale Opportunity Module to the Tryton Application Platform.
+
+WWW: http://www.tryton.org/
